Package com.pms.model

Class Project

java.lang.Object
com.pms.model.Project
Direct Known Subclasses:
InfrastructureProject, MobileAppProject, WebDevelopmentProject
public abstract class Project extends Object
Abstract superclass for every kind of project the company runs. This is the "Super class: PROJECT" from the assignment brief. Concrete subclasses (WebDevelopmentProject, MobileAppProject, InfrastructureProject) each define their own billing rate and type label, demonstrating polymorphism over this shared contract.

      public abstract double calculateBillingRate()
      Hourly billing rate — differs per project type. Implemented by each subclass.

      Human-readable project type, e.g. "Web Development". Implemented by each subclass.
